first.content: Tokens are short-lived — 15 minutes — to reduce exposure

first.label: SQLite concurrent write limit
first.content: SQLite cannot handle concurrent writes at scale

second.label: write concurrency problem
second.content: Multiple simultaneous writes caused SQLite locking issues
